title: Devops Engineer for Bitbucket Pipelines, Dokku Review Apps
description:
We're looking for a devops engineer to help with some extra capaacity and work on our build pipelines.

Current stack is Bitbucket, and baremetal servers on Hetzner that run Dokku for git based deployments.

What we are looking to finish today is a bitbucket based 'review app' workflow, where developers can run a custom pipeline on a bitbucket PR that builds a review app via Dokku, and then decommissions it after merge.
